Before making any suggestions or changes, read and follow the coding standards and conventions defined in:

- [docs/software-dev-standards-js.md](../docs/software-dev-standards-js.md)

This file covers:
- Project overview and purpose
- Technical framework (GOV.UK Prototype Kit, Express, CommonJS, Nunjucks)
- Folder structure (`app/` layout)
- Code standards (templates, SCSS, JavaScript, accessibility, content design)
- Development workflow (Docker)
- File creation guidelines
- Quality checklist
